headline: MemryX Appoints Ross Jatou as CEO and Joe Faris as VP of Sales and Marketing to Accelerate AI Infrastructure Expansion
summary: MemryX Inc., a developer of AI inference acceleration solutions, today announced the appointments of Ross Jatou as Chief Executive Officer and Joe Faris as Vice President of Sales and Marketing. The appointments strengthen MemryX's leadership team as the company expands its commercially deployed AI acceleration architecture from edge applications into emerging data center opportunities.

headline: AI Infrastructure Investing Goes Deeper: New Leveraged Semiconductor ETFs Tied To Microchip, NXP, ON Semi Hits The Market
summary: Tradr ETFs' new 2X leveraged ETFs tracking Microchip, NXP Semiconductors, ON Semiconductor, offers amplified exposure to AI and chip stocks beyond Nvidia.

headline: 10 Overvalued Stocks Are Ticking Time Bombs In Your Portfolio
summary: Valuations by themselves aren't a great predictor of drops in S&P 500 stocks. But they hold some weight paired with forecasts.
